issue_title: Morphing Text Doesn't work properly on Firefox
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
The Morphing Text Effects are not working as expected. The text is simply fading into the next text.

**Expected behavior**
The Morphing Animation should display on Firefox as expected.

**Screenshots**
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/399487d0-e28e-4e6
test_description_zh: 在 Firefox 浏览器中打开包含 Morphing Text 组件的页面，观察文本之间的切换动画效果，注意文字是否有逐字符的形变动画。
expected_result_zh: Morphing Text 组件在 Firefox 浏览器中应正确展示文字变形（morphing）动画，文本切换时呈现字符级别的平滑形变过渡效果，而非仅仅简单的整体淡入淡出。
